body:
Americans deserve common-sense solutions and lasting reforms!
Gov. John Kasich continues to lead on these issues and it's
critical that we continue raising the funds to support this
message.

Peter, we have a critical
fundraising deadline on Saturday and could use your help.

Please consider chipping in $10,
$25, $100 or whatever you can right now to help us keep fighting
for bipartisan solutions to America's challenges, like health
care, immigration and reining in the out-of-control costs of
government that are growing our national debt.

Gov. John Kasich continues to
lead on these issues and it's critical that we continue raising
the funds to support this message.

Americans deserve common-sense
solutions and lasting reforms!

Thank you for all that you're
doing to help.

-Team Kasich

committee.

name: Keith Ellison
subject: Don't get disheartened, Derek
body:
Let's start October with momentum on our side.
---
**Pitch in $3 or whatever you can before tomorrow's end-of-quarter deadline to help Democrats win in every state.

** **[DONATE](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523496/4067b0a/3a40184b9/7e620cc2/2002280813/VEsH/ "https://my.democrats.org/September-Deadline-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20170929_ke_nd&source=em_20170929_ke_nd&refcode=em_20170929_ke_nd")**

I want to say thanks, Derek.

With Donald Trump in the White House, it's easy to get disheartened. But you haven't. You're one of millions of people, of every background, from all across the country who stood up and rose to meet this moment head on.

Your fighting spirit inspires me every day. But you and I know that it doesn't get easier from here. We're just getting started.

Tomorrow, we'll be facing our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline. [**With health care for millions at risk, just 39 days until important elections in states like Virginia, and control of Congress on the line next year, the stakes can't get any higher.**](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523496/4067b0a/3a40184b9/7e620cc1/2002280813/VEsE/ "https://my.democrats.org/September-Deadline-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+With+health+care+for+millions+at+risk+ju&utm_campaign=em_20170929_ke_nd&source=em_20170929_ke_nd&refcode=em_20170929_ke_nd")

You've proven how much we can accomplish when we come together around our shared values. And now we must take that same passion and motivation and use it to build Democratic power for the weeks and months ahead.

Before our end-of-quarter deadline, pitch in $3 or more to help Democrats win elections and keep bringing the fight to Trump and the GOP.

**If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately.

[ QUICK DONATE: $3](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523496/4067b0a/3a40184b9/7e620cca/2002280813/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/september-deadline-2017?express_lane=true&amount=3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+QUICK+DONATE+3&utm_campaign=em_20170929_ke_nd&source=em_20170929_ke_nd&refcode=em_20170929_ke_nd")
[QUICK DONATE: $10](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523496/4067b0a/3a40184b9/7e620cd7/2002280813/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/september-deadline-2017?express_lane=true&amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+QUICK+DONATE+10&utm_campaign=em_20170929_ke_nd&source=em_20170929_ke_nd&refcode=em_20170929_ke_nd")
[QUICK DONATE: $25](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523496/4067b0a/3a40184b9/7e620cd0/2002280813/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/september-deadline-2017?express_lane=true&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+QUICK+DONATE+25&utm_campaign=em_20170929_ke_nd&source=em_20170929_ke_nd&refcode=em_20170929_ke_nd")
[QUICK DONATE: $50](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523496/4067b0a/3a40184b9/7e620cdc/2002280813/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/september-deadline-2017?express_lane=true&amount=50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+QUICK+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=em_20170929_ke_nd&source=em_20170929_ke_nd&refcode=em_20170929_ke_nd")
[QUICK DONATE: $100](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523496/4067b0a/3a40184b9/7e620ce6/2002280813/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/september-deadline-2017?express_lane=true&amount=100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+QUICK+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_20170929_ke_nd&source=em_20170929_ke_nd&refcode=em_20170929_ke_nd")
[Or donate another amount.](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523496/4067b0a/3a40184b9/7e620ce5/2002280813/VEsO/ "https://my.democrats.org/September-Deadline-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=8+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em_20170929_ke_nd&source=em_20170929_ke_nd&refcode=em_20170929_ke_nd")
** Thanks for everything,

Keith

Keith Ellison
Deputy Chair

Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523496/4067b0a/3a40184b9/7e620cec/2002280813/VEsHBQ/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=10+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170929_ke_nd&source=em_20170929_ke_nd&refcode=em_20170929_ke_nd"). This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523496/4067b0a/3a40184b9/7e620cf7/2002280813/VEsHBw/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=12+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170929_ke_nd&source=em_20170929_ke_nd&refcode=em_20170929_ke_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

name: Trump Headquarters
subject: Re: Update your record
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican National Committee
body:
Did you see this email from the President? |
---
| | | | | | | |

Peter,

**We wanted to be sure you knew this is your last chance to update your record before our end-of-quarter deadline at 11:59 PM TOMORROW.**

President Trump is counting on top supporters like you to step up and become 2017 Sustaining Members to combat the flood of fake news and obstructionist attacks from the Left.

**[All it takes is a contribution of just $1 before 11:59 PM TOMORROW to renew your Sustaining Membership for the 2017 year.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=93c92c043fd0c9a73059553a1c576cb657f0289e36e005bfbadf71110faa77e45de52f457609917ac91f03619eed0039)**

**The President has requested a list of of every person who renews their membership,** and we wanted to be sure your name was on that list, Peter.
[CONTRIBUTE $1](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=93c92c043fd0c9a75ff50c154b6adede2ddd6298a240d140b4166ad700259e76599b16d2cc62a735567c9617948f6279) Thank you for your continued support,

Team Trump

[CONTRIBUTE $1](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=93c92c043fd0c9a7ff596a77153bea1c012ab9a500d414f5475bb3ad93d32152bcc68975f96c1c498d68cdfd3d9118e0)

**\---------- Forwarded Message ----------**
From: Donald J. Trump
Date: September 28, 2017
Subject: I've requested a list
To: **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=93c92c043fd0c9a762e7f4a8d6cf75233ab138af0a5a47e18b5c45cce36075fa94f313195c68be070b8dd4b4265221fc)**

---
Peter,

No matter what the Fake News Media reports, we're working to advance our agenda _**every day**_.

In the first 9 months alone, we've delivered on our promises and have proven we're ready to fight for what we believe is right for the future of this great country.

**We did it together in 2016, and there 's no doubt in my mind we have the momentum to keep it going. But I need to know you're committed to our movement, Peter**.

This is your last chance to update your record before our end-of-quarter deadline, and I'm hoping you'll do so by renewing your Sustaining Membership:
---
| **2017 Sustaining Membership** **Email:[dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=93c92c043fd0c9a7aedf696abb26d04cb805b06ecaf483cbda4bb4805a551118be7dc28cefc69fbe20b8693ca6025f0d)
Account Number: **715931-2017**2017 Sustaining Membership:** **PENDING****Renewal Deadline:** September 30, 11:59 PM [CONTRIBUTE $1](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=93c92c043fd0c9a76cc813bf313b96d27934e27e2f9b2dd49f9a90aa8886c3359ee99b6df903a4c8e0b6c75d8127bf81) **[Please contribute just $1 to renew your Sustaining Membership for the 2017 year.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=93c92c043fd0c9a7096340c65ce32082aa3932bd79bff722247645401920536dbe691dfabd4217c853cae9ccab84e7d7)**

We cannot allow the Fake News Media and obstructionist Democrats to flood the airwaves and mislead the American people, Peter, and they are our _strongest opponent yet._

**[So please, be sure to renew your 2017 Sustaining Membership before the September 30 deadline.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=93c92c043fd0c9a7807c330fbf21cf0027c910c97830e916902f88b73fa1af1ff74f21aa58aa55d01332076d322aee99)**

Thank you,

[](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=93c92c043fd0c9a7dac9d0198036570adab77c8329249bbac0c6e44a34c6583611daf338f2e8441e4c3790546fb97620)
Donald J. Trump
President of The United States

P.S. - I've requested a list of every person who steps up and renews their 2017 Sustaining Membership before the September 30 deadline. **I hope to see your name on the list.**

[CONTRIBUTE $1](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=93c92c043fd0c9a7ff596a77153bea1c012ab9a500d414f5475bb3ad93d32152bcc68975f96c1c498d68cdfd3d9118e0)

subject: You've set yourself apart, Derek
body:
Our September quarterly deadline is tomorrow at midnight.
---
**Pitch in $3 or whatever you can before tomorrow's end-of-quarter deadline to help Democrats win in every state.

** **[DONATE](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405234a0/4067b0a/3a154b541/7e62ed3a/1674138311/VEsH/ "https://my.democrats.org/September-Deadline-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20170929_joc_nd&source=em_20170929_joc_nd&refcode=em_20170929_joc_nd")**

Real quick, Derek, I want to take a moment to thank you for everything you're doing to help Democrats win.

Every time you pick up the phone to tell Republicans in Congress how you feel about issues like protecting our care, lace up your tennis shoes to go knock on doors and register voters, sign a petition to take a stand, **[or pitch in a few dollars to support great Democratic candidates](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405234a0/4067b0a/3a154b541/7e62ed3b/1674138311/VEsE/ "https://my.democrats.org/September-Deadline-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+or+pitch+in+a+few+dollars+to+support+gre&utm_campaign=em_20170929_joc_nd&source=em_20170929_joc_nd&refcode=em_20170929_joc_nd")** , you're setting yourself apart. You're not going to sit around and complain -- you're going to take action.

I'm so proud to be working alongside you to build this movement. Together, we're mobilizing our communities to elect more Democrats and laying the groundwork to make sure Donald Trump never sees a second term in the White House.

For everything you're doing, Derek, thank you. Your grassroots support is how we win. So, if you can, will you step up one more time before tomorrow's FEC deadline so we can start October strong?

name: Hillary Clinton
subject: Will you join me?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
---
Derek --

When I was running for president, one of the things I said so often is that we need more love and kindness in this country. These are the values that have always motivated me -- and they're a big part of why I chose Tim Kaine as my running mate.

If you mention Tim to anyone who knows him, whether it's a member of his church congregation who sang with him in the choir or a Republican senator who works with him across the aisle, you're likely to hear the same thing: Tim is a guy who believes in love and kindness.

**I'm proud to call Tim and Anne my friends, and I'm doing all I can to support Tim in his reelection campaign. Will you join me?** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $10>>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=B%2FzVaq6pPX51MPfUgxe%2BCqstslDf9vwa)**
**[Express donate $25>>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=eTHzk6GQ12iU2NALKm%2B6666peRkxH7IY)**
**[Express donate $50>>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=S3UwgttGLzF%2F%2FJMKedBYtKstslDf9vwa)**
**[Express donate $100>>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=vsDiOaWxmPUCcMwDDTecrqstslDf9vwa)**
**[Or, donate a different amount>>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=VGAINd24BZYgy8l%2BGoDGAqstslDf9vwa)**

Here's the thing: Losing the election was hard -- for all of us. It's also hard to keep mustering the energy to continue fighting, day after day, for the America we still believe in. But what would be hardest of all is giving up.

Tim is someone who never gives up. When we lost in November, he didn't even take a vacation -- he went right back to work for Virginians in the Senate. For Tim, there was no rest for the weary. Guided by his love of this country and his care for the people he serves, he knew he had to continue to fight for what's right -- for Virginians and all Americans -- inch by inch, tooth and nail, no matter the obstacle. And now, more than ever, that's what we need in the Senate. So today, I'm asking you to help make sure we keep him there.

**[Please join me in supporting Tim's campaign by pitching in $10 or whatever you can right now.](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=f8gO72D7%2FNLcWkOyJQ2oP6stslDf9vwa)**

Tim and I are both guided by faith, and during the campaign, we always reminded one another of this creed: Do all the good you can, for all the people you can, in all the ways you can, as long as ever you can.

**Let's make sure Tim can keep doing good for Virginia families in the Senate. Commit to supporting him before tomorrow night's midnight deadline:**

**[https://www.timkaine.com/september-deadline](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=2wJdTSQvSiXiUZwKgPgtNastslDf9vwa)**

Thank you,

Hillary

name: The White House
subject: Recovery Efforts in Puerto Rico
body:
1600 Daily
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=8b1057667d2bda6c05e4f5e0c75f57cc409ba69fcdc6b06e316f93c5157a904f941ecfc22d2b12ef6d625c797d3e77f95522f6c9002dbc6b

President Trump's Weekly Address

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=8b1057667d2bda6ca4911a7f1b3ecb6d4bb8f5431845180519a5e1d73e474e1c56fe56ec34fbc07b31ea233908512938d148a0a79969301f

Hurricane Update
President Donald J. Trump is actively engaged in monitoring the recovery efforts in Puerto Rico, and the full weight of the United States government is engaged to ensure that food, water, healthcare, and other lifesaving resources are making it to the people in need. At the request of the Governor of Puerto Rico, Ricardo Rossello, the President authorized Acting Secretary Duke to waive the Jones Act to ensure that ample resources are making it to the island, and we will continue to focus on the challenge of distributing those resources. The island setting presents logistical hurdles that do not exist on the mainland where trucks from around the country can converge on disaster areas. Ten thousand federal government relief workers are there, including 7,200 troops that are now on the
island and working tirelessly to get people what they need. Lifesaving resources to hospitals have been prioritized, and 57 of the island's 69 hospitals are now operational. The Army Corps of Engineers is spearheading a massive mobilization to restore power, and this began with providing the diesel fuel necessary for sustainable emergency power generation. They're also working to restore long-term power generation and distribution around the island. There's a long way to go, but we will not rest until everyone is safe and secure. Our message to the incredible people of Puerto Rico is this: The President is behind you. We all are -- the entire country. Your unbreakable spirit is an inspiration to us all. We are praying for you, we are working for you, and we will not let you down.

FEMA Update

Yesterday, FEMA announced that all municipalities in Puerto Rico have been reached by search and rescue thanks to the joint efforts of multiple federal agencies. President Trump and Acting Secretary of Homeland Security Elaine Duke received a comprehensive briefing from FEMA on Thursday morning on disaster relief. Points of this briefing included:

- FEMA and its federal partners continue 24-hour operations to reach inaccessible areas of Puerto Rico to reach survivors, provide fuel to hospitals, and re-open.
- The travel distance to the Islands as well as substantial impacts to air and sea ports, has presented complex challenges requiring a phased approach to the delivery of personnel, resources, equipment to move the resources, and lodging for responders.
- There are thousands of federal staff, including more than 600 FEMA personnel, on the ground in Puerto Rico and the U.S. Virgin Islands engaged in response and recovery operations from Hurricanes Maria and Irma. Hundreds of additional federal personnel are supporting response and recovery operations through mainland coordination centers and logistics facilities.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=8b1057667d2bda6c74005aa28d5e16146191f833f45272668f18b8b860c71c884916280ffcb0a9e94972f7d5d0ba457cebb00bcc26ce7d42
Watch this morning's briefing

Acting Secretary of DHS Elaine Duke and Homeland Security Advisor Tom Bossert Provide Hurricane Update
Acting Secretary of Homeland Security Elaine Duke is on the ground in Puerto Rico today. She and Homeland Security Advisor Tom Bossert provided an update on the ongoing hurricane relief efforts in Puerto Rico and the U.S. Virgin Islands yesterday. Our response is, and has been from day one, people first. The focus is on immediate relief and gaining access to all areas of the island. 4 ports and 8 airports are now open, which allows for supplies to get on the island.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=8b1057667d2bda6cf7481d7c98c28d62322b286a7239e6709d74e56d3bd4c9168f63062370e22ae97c32144a6ddc9705e1849d894cd9f259
Watch the briefing

Photo of the Day

President Donald J. Trump celebrates the 70th Anniversary of the National Security Council | September 28, 2017 (Official White House Photo by Shealah Craighead)

POTUS and VP TODAY

Today, President Trump delivered remarks to the National Association of Manufacturers in Washington, D.C. Vice President Pence participated in a meeting with President Hashim Thaçi of Kosovo and then joined President Trump for lunch with Governor Rick Scott. Later in the day, the Vice President will visit the National Reconnaissance Office.

Coming Up

Next week, the President will travel to Puerto Rico and the U.S. Virgin Islands to meet with victims of Hurricane Maria and survey recovery operations.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=8b1057667d2bda6c3c08ce14ba921897767cfcc1a83703c06b707eb294019767c6a01e7767b7b1cf26ea89661a8f2c434c248382ab431f69

Contact the White House |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d4d45db773a9b2f2fa8dcd2338f5d89729796ce08afea9b48269e99de7f51db82c50d1d303ddf158771cfac9df036228f3

Points of this briefing included: - FEMA and its federal partners continue 24-hour operations to reach inaccessible areas of Puerto Rico to reach survivors, provide fuel to hospitals, and re-open. - The travel distance to the Islands as well as substantial impacts to air and sea ports, has presented complex challenges requiring a phased approach to the delivery of personnel, resources, equipment to move the resources, and lodging for responders. - There are thousands of federal staff, including more than 600 FEMA personnel, on the ground in Puerto Rico and the U.S. Virgin Islands engaged in response and recovery operations from Hurricanes Maria and Irma. Hundreds of additional federal personnel are supporting response and recovery operations through mainland coordination centers and logistics facilities. Watch this morning's briefing Acting Secretary of DHS Elaine Duke and Homeland Security Advisor Tom Bossert Provide Hurricane Update Acting Secretary of Homeland Security Elaine Duke is on the ground in Puerto Rico today. She and Homeland Security Advisor Tom Bossert provided an update on the ongoing hurricane relief efforts in Puerto Rico and the U.S. Virgin Islands yesterday. Our response is, and has been from day one, people first. The focus is on immediate relief and gaining access to all areas of the island. 4 ports and 8 airports are now open, which allows for supplies to get on the island. Watch the briefing Photo of the Day President Donald J. Trump celebrates the 70th Anniversary of the National Security Council | September 28, 2017 (Official White House Photo by Shealah Craighead) POTUS and VP TODAY Today, President Trump delivered remarks to the National Association of Manufacturers in Washington, D.C. Vice President Pence participated in a meeting with President Hashim Thaçi of Kosovo and then joined President Trump for lunch with Governor Rick Scott. Later in the day, the Vice President will visit the National Reconnaissance Office. Coming Up Next week, the President will travel to Puerto Rico and the U.S. Virgin Islands to meet with victims of Hurricane Maria and survey recovery operations.

disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILY's List [www
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c6104/24c69fd9/9288795c/189d824c/2642172851/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFE958N_digital_email_20170929_EOQConstConven_inact&source=WQEFE958N_digital_email_20170929_EOQConstConven_inact")

Peter,

Republicans control 32 state legislatures -- that's just two short of what they need to call a constitutional convention _**without a single Democratic vote.**_

There's no telling what all they'd attack if they had the power. Marriage equality? Voting rights? Reproductive freedom?

Because this is so unprecedented, a constitutional convention could open up all these possibilities and more. So we're on a mission to flip key state legislatures from red to blue -- and prevent Republicans from getting the two-thirds majority they need to call a convention.

**[Donate $3 to help hit our $250,000 End-of-Quarter goal so we can elect pro-choice Democratic women at the state level who can block Republican plans to call a constitutional convention.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c6104/24c69fd9/9288795c/189d824d/2642172851/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170925_email_SeptEOQ-ns?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+3+to+help+hit+our+250000+EndofQua&utm_campaign=WQEFE958N_digital_email_20170929_EOQConstConven_inact&source=WQEFE958N_digital_email_20170929_EOQConstConven_inact")**

As strange as this plan sounds, this isn't a theoretical or "someday" concern -- Republicans are mobilizing _right now_ to make it happen.

They've held mock constitutional conventions around the country, and they're zeroing in on certain states they think they can use to get to the 34 they need to call a real convention.

We're targeting state chambers, too -- we've put 12 Republican-controlled state legislative chambers "On Notice." Even flipping a few seats in these states could move Republicans significantly further away from being able to tear apart the Constitution.

One of those states is Virginia, where we have a whopping 16 women running for state House seats. If we can elect all of them, they can help flip the Virginia House from red to blue.

**Donate $3 to help meet our $250,000 End-of-Quarter goal so that we can elect candidates to state legislatures and stop the GOP plot to change the Constitution:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Reach-Our-EOQ-Goal](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c6104/24c69fd9/9288795c/189d824e/2642172851/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170925_email_SeptEOQ-ns?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgReachOurEOQGoal&utm_campaign=WQEFE958N_digital_email_20170929_EOQConstConven_inact&source=WQEFE958N_digital_email_20170929_EOQConstConven_inact")**

Thanks,

Jenna Kruse

name: Leah Vukmir
subject: deadline approaching
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Leah for Senate
body:
We’ve had enough of the so-called leaders who have made careers out of supporting Washington politics as usual. It’s time for real, conservative......

Friend, we’re a day away from the biggest test of our campaign to date.

It’s our first end-of-quarter fundraising deadline since declaring my race for the U.S. Senate.

As you can imagine -- these FEC deadlines -- they’re an establishment favorite. They scour every line, with the media, determining which candidates have the fitness to continue running for office. It’s how they choose winners and losers in politics.

If we don’t meet our fundraising goals this quarter, you can bet a room full of Washington elites will sigh comfortably in relief.

If our numbers are big? Well, the establishment will be _very_ uneasy.

name: Jill Donnelly
subject: don't count him out
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
I've seen Joe counted out before and it didn't stop him. |
---

| | Peter,

Some are already looking at this race and counting Joe out, saying that a commonsense Democrat like him can't win in Indiana. Joe and I have been married for almost 40 years -- I've seen him counted out before and it didn't stop him. This time won't be any different.

Joe is committed to fighting for Hoosiers and the state he loves in the Senate, but we need the resources to keep him there. Tomorrow is the last chance to reach our end-of-quarter goal and unlock the donor match that will _double_ every contribution. **So, I 'm asking: Can Joe count on you to chip in and be one of the last 96 donors we need to hit our end-of-quarter goal and unlock our donor match?** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

No matter what outside groups throw at him, Joe will never stop working on his top priorities: standing up for veterans and servicemembers who put their lives on the line for this country, providing security for our children and seniors, and defending our right to affordable health care.

**We have to send Joe back to the Senate to fight for Hoosier families who deserve a champion that gives everything he has to serve our state.**

Jill Donnelly

Sisters and Brothers --

Just the other day, we defeated another attempt by Senate Republicans to take away health care from millions of Americans.

Now let me be totally clear: If Republicans try again to repeal Obamacare, we will fight them with everything we have. We will not sit back and allow millions of Americans, some with life-threatening illnesses, to lose their lifelines to medical care. But let me also say that our ultimate goal is to go beyond the status quo. In the wealthiest country in the history of the world, health care must be a right, not a privilege, for every man, woman, and child. We must not pay the highest prices in the world for prescription drugs. And that is why I recently introduced, along with 16 other Democrats, a Medicare for All Single Payer bill.

As you know, there is growing disgust in this country with a Republican Party that is not only trying to decimate health care for millions, but wants to give tax breaks to billionaires and refuses to even acknowledge the reality of climate change. Right now, our job is to elect Democrats who have the courage to stand up to the billionaire class and fight for the 99 percent. Our job is to turn back Trump's reactionary agenda, and move this country forward in a progressive way.

So today, I want to ask you to do something important:

[**Make a $1 donation to Senate Democrats before this Saturday 's important FEC fundraising deadline.**](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-democrats?refcode=DPE-20170929-Sanders-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

One of the most significant realities of modern politics is just how successful the Koch brothers and like-minded billionaires have been at moving the Republican Party to the extreme right.

Ideas that were dismissed as downright crazy in 1980 -- like abolishing Medicaid, Medicare, and privatizing Social Security -- are now part of today's mainstream Republican thinking. Sometimes I wonder what world these people are living in.

But that is what we are up against, and it will take all of us coming together, people of all backgrounds, to defeat them next November.

[**Help Senate Democrats do that with your $1 donation before this important FEC fundraising deadline.**](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-democrats?refcode=DPE-20170929-Sanders-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

Not only must we win elections in 2018, we must fight to make the Democratic Party a 50 state party. We can no longer abdicate dozens of states in this country to right-wing Republican extremists. We need to mobilize millions of Americans -- black, white, Latino, Asian-American, Native American -- at the grassroots level to create an economy and government which represents all of us, not just the one percent.

In solidarity,

Bernie Sanders

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954de49/2b07114c/15a41e12/7315fd4a/2496437514/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954de49/2b07114c/15a41e12/7315fd45/2496437514/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954de49/2b07114c/15a41e12/7315fd44/2496437514/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.

name: Democrats.org
subject: This goal is mission critical, Derek
body:
Step up before tomorrow's deadline.
---
**Pitch in $3 or whatever you can before tomorrow's end-of-quarter deadline to help Democrats win in every state.

** **[DONATE](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405234bd/4067b0a/3a075460c/7e62a274/915603516/VEsH/ "https://my.democrats.org/September-Deadline-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20170929_ems_nd&source=em_20170929_ems_nd&refcode=em_20170929_ems_nd")**

I'm going to cut right to the chase, Derek. **[I need you to pitch in $3 or more before our fundraising deadline tomorrow night.](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405234bd/4067b0a/3a075460c/7e62a275/915603516/VEsE/ "https://my.democrats.org/September-Deadline-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+I+need+you+to+pitch+in+3+or+more+before+&utm_campaign=em_20170929_ems_nd&source=em_20170929_ems_nd&refcode=em_20170929_ems_nd")**

The primary goal of the DNC is a simple one: Support Democrats up and down the ballot so they can win in every state -- from the school board to the Senate. As Finance Director, my goal is to ask people like you to chip in what you can so that Democrats running for office across the country have the resources they need to fight for us and the values that we share.

We've all seen it -- the GOP is willing to do whatever they can to win. And with billionaires lining up to support them, these fundraising deadlines have become mission critical.

We have something that the other side doesn't: Millions of grassroots supporters like you, Derek. In recent months, you all have gathered together, organized, and dedicated your time, energy, and, yes, your hard-earned money to push back against Donald Trump and the Republicans' awful agenda.

With only 39 days before statewide elections in states like Virginia, and our campaign to take back Congress needing to ramp up, this fundraising deadline is going to determine a lot.

That's why I have to ask -- if you can, will you pitch in $3 or more right now?

**If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately.

name: Andrew Gillum
subject: I want to talk with you
body:
#
Team --
Our critical end of month deadline is quickly approaching, and I wanted to reach out to talk with you a little about what that means.
Right now, we're less than a year out from our primary election, and a little over a year away from the general election. In just under seven months, we've gone from being the longshot campaign that most folks had never heard of, to the people-powered campaign with the most grassroots donations of any candidate in the race. We've been shocked by the outpouring of support we've seen in different parts of the state, in big cities and small towns, in both deep red and bright blue counties.
You all have gone above and beyond to make this campaign and this movement possible -- and I am thankful to each and every one of you for that. You have proven your commitment to this race time and time again, which is why I'm asking:
[**Can you lift up our campaign one more time with a contribution before our end of month deadline tomorrow night?**](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3280/9e00690/4f4880b3/24031442/1536782145/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-sept2017?refcode=em170929-eom")
Your support means we can continue to stick to our progressive principles and focus on spreading our message to every corner of the state. It makes it possible for us to talk about critical issues like Medicare for All, better public education funding, college affordability, an economy that puts working people first, investments in infrastructure, protecting our environment, and so much more.
We don't have to worry about what any big special interests donors are saying -- our grassroots campaign means that we're of, by, and for the people. We're only worried about doing what's best for the people of Florida.
[**If this is a movement you 'd like to be a part of, please pitch in to support our campaign today, and together we will win in 2018.**](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3280/9e00690/4f4880b3/24031442/1536782145/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-sept2017?refcode=em170929-eom")
Thank you for everything.
Bring it home,
Andrew
**[CONTRIBUTE](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3280/9e00690/4f4880b3/24031442/1536782145/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-sept2017?refcode=em170929-eom")**

Paid by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor

We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3280/9e00690/4f4880b3/24031444/1536782145/VEsD/ "https://gillum.cp.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe/"). [You can support our campaign by making a donation.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3280/9e00690/4f4880b3/24031447/1536782145/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-footer")

**NH REPUBLICAN PARTY****WEEKLY NEWSLETTER**
**FRIDAY, SEPTEMBER 29th** **_A Note From Jeanie_** **Dear Derek,**
**Today is National VFW Day, a day that is observed every year on September 29th, honoring men and women devoted to this valuable organization and those members who have served our nation. As a life member of the VFW Auxiliary I am pleased to be able to attend a celebration tonight at the Laconia VFW Auxiliary 1670.********My dad was a paratrooper in the Korean War and I grew up spending my weekends at the VFW with my dad. Every Friday night was “Fish Fry” where dad would help organize and serve food. It was a great family atmosphere and instilled in me the importance and value of recognizing and honoring our veterans. clean_body: nh.gop NH REPUBLICAN PARTYWEEKLY NEWSLETTER FRIDAY, SEPTEMBER 29th A Note From Jeanie Dear Derek, Today is National VFW Day, a day that is observed every year on September 29th, honoring men and women devoted to this valuable organization and those members who have served our nation. As a life member of the VFW Auxiliary I am pleased to be able to attend a celebration tonight at the Laconia VFW Auxiliary 1670.****My dad was a paratrooper in the Korean War and I grew up spending my weekends at the VFW with my dad. Every Friday night was “Fish Fry” where dad would help organize and serve food. It was a great family atmosphere and instilled in me the importance and value of recognizing and honoring our veterans. He was proud to be a member of that organization, and I was proud of him.****Here in New Hampshire, there are so many great organizations and good folks who believe in the importance of supporting our veterans in whatever way they can, whether its dedicating a full page of news on veterans’ activities like the Union Leader, or young folks like teen Kylee Rock volunteering at the Veterans’ Home in Tilton, or raising over $400k for veterans like (founded by Julie & Phil Taub of Bedford), did this past summer--across the spectrum we honor our vets.****For our part here at the NH Republican State Committee, we’re partnering with key leaders in the veteran community (like Paul & Cathie Chevalier) and RNC staff to create a veterans’ outreach program. ****So today, please take a moment to honor the VFW members and veterans in your community. Tell them how much you appreciate the sacrifices they have made for all of us. And remember, we truly are the land of the free because of the brave. Sincerely, Jeanie Join the Grassroots Circle! The Grassroots Circle is a unique way for you to get involved while supporting the Party. Becoming a member couldn't be easier -- join today for as little as $10 per month. There are three levels of support: The Grassroots Supporter, the NHGOP Advocate and the VIP Investor. Intern with the NH GOP! Are you a student or know a student that is interested in Politics?** Learn the skills necessary to win elections and meet the Republican leaders that govern our State and write legislation. REPUBLICAN SPOTLIGHT Thank you for all of your submissions! This week our Republican spotlight is Tony Giunta! Tony is on the ballot in Franklin next week to return as Franklin's Mayor! He previously held the office from 2000-2004. Voters of Franklin, get out and vote for Tony Giunta! Who do you think should be in the spotlight in next week's newsletter? body:

| |
---
| **The Hoosier Way Goes National**
* * *
On Wednesday, Indiana had the privilege of welcoming**** President**Donald Trump** to our capital city. And it was no ordinary visit. President Trump came to Indiana to officially introduce his four point [tax reform framework](http://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=4208dc4411&e=1acd9bb3d6) that already has the backing and support of key Congressional leadership in the U.S. Senate and House. This framework focuses particular attention on middle class families and eliminates loopholes that have long benefited the wealthy. Not only did President Trump give Indiana great reviews for our work on this very issue here at home, but his speech is [getting](http://indgop.us11.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=badc45a1cf&e=1acd9bb3d6) [great](http://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=0b94949709&e=1acd9bb3d6) [reviews](http://indgop.us11.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=5c298cd708&e=1acd9bb3d6) and drawing [praise](http://indgop.us11.list-manage2.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=74195e0901&e=1acd9bb3d6) from both sides of the aisle. The Indiana Republican Party, and our strong Congressional delegation, stand with President Trump and Vice President **Mike Pence** in support of this ambitious federal tax reform plan. It's time to take the Hoosier Way national!

\- Kyle Hupfer

(Photo: Chairman Hupfer talking to WCPO - Cincinnati following President Trump's remarks on tax reform.)
---
| |
---
| | _**Governor Holcomb's Week That Was**_
---
|
---
---
| You're used to hearing Indiana referred to as the "Crossroads of America." Although that one is well known, Governor **Eric Holcomb** recently articulated his vision of taking it a step further by making Indiana the "Crossroads of the Universe." To that end, the Governor [welcomed](http://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=56d2a67e28&e=1acd9bb3d6) the Consul General of Italy, Dr. **Maria Manca** , to his office this week. Indiana is already home to multiple Italian companies, and as we continue to build relationships such as this one, we're bound to welcome more Italian-based companies to the mix soon.

But being the "Crossroads of America" and the "Crossroads of the Universe" isn't enough for Governor Holcomb, so he added yet a new phrase to the lexicon of Hoosier mottoes this week: "[Crosswaters of America](http://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=120d81e07c&e=1acd9bb3d6)." This not only keeps the "Crossroads" theme alive, it also accurately depicts the recent investment of South Korea-based company POSCO which opened its second U.S. plant at the Port of Indiana-Jeffersonville. According to [_Inside Indiana Business_](http://indgop.us11.list-manage2.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=93f02cd27c&e=1acd9bb3d6), the Governor added that "the last three years have seen Indiana Ports record the highest totals in their 56-year history."

**_Apply for the Republican Leadership Initiative &
Get The Experience You Need to Lead_** Are you looking for ways to get more involved in the Republican Party? Have you ever wondered how you can help elect good candidates to office and help spread our message in your community? If so, the [Republican Leadership Initiative](http://indgop.us11.list-manage2.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=0d4bf13145&e=1acd9bb3d6) (RLI) is for you! Sponsored by the Republican National Committee, in conjunction with your Indiana Republican Party, RLI is an [extensive training program](http://indgop.us11.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=b5efcc8e67&e=1acd9bb3d6) focused on providing Republican volunteers and activists the tools they need to lead. The program teaches participants the most effective strategies in grassroots campaigning and communications and gives everyone an opportunity to work alongside battle-tested GOP operatives.

Learn more about the Republican Leadership Initiative and apply to be a Program Fellow [here](http://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=44cf9e093c&e=1acd9bb3d6).

name: Team Ryan
subject: Game. Changer.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Ryan, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Ryan for Congress, Inc
body:
****
**** **** | |
| | **September 29, 2017**
---|---

Paul Ryan and Republicans were excited this week to finally introduce a tax code that works for hardworking Americans. Our goals are the same: to take power out of Washington and give it back to taxpayers; to create jobs and grow paychecks - then let you keep more of what you earn; and to make the system so simple, most Americans will be able to fill out their taxes on a form the size of a post card.

Paul has always been excited about finally fixing our ridiculous tax code - now his enthusiasm is clearly spreading. Here's what conservatives across the country are saying about his plan.

| **** | **FOX News**
---
**Paul Ryan: Plan provides relief to middle class taxpayers******

_
"This is about delivering middle class taxpayers tax relief. There are a lot of people in this country working paycheck to paycheck, a lot of people in this country, because of the slow growth economy we had in the Obama years, never got a raise. A lot of economic anxiety. So this is really about them.

"This is about letting those hardworking taxpayers keep more of their own money and giving them a tax break, but, also simplifying the system so much that nine out of 10 taxpayers can fill out their taxes on a postcard.

clean_body: We’ve had enough of the so-called leaders who have made careers out of supporting Washington politics as usual. It’s time for real, conservative...... Friend, we’re a day away from the biggest test of our campaign to date. It’s our first end-of-quarter fundraising deadline since declaring my race for the U.S. Senate. As you can imagine -- these FEC deadlines -- they’re an establishment favorite. They scour every line, with the media, determining which candidates have the fitness to continue running for office. It’s how they choose winners and losers in politics. If we don’t meet our fundraising goals this quarter, you can bet a room full of Washington elites will sigh comfortably in relief. If our numbers are big? Well, the establishment will be very uneasy. And Friend, I’m not running for Senate in Wisconsin to make the establishment feel comfortable.** With only $11,623 left to meet our goals this quarter, Friend, I’m running for YOU because I believe Wisconsin deserves better than what we’ve been getting. We deserve senators who actually do what they say they’re going to do when they get to Washington. We can’t afford to elect any more politicians who don’t deliver on their promises. We’ve had enough of the so-called leaders who have made careers out of supporting Washington politics as usual. It’s time for real, conservative change and proven leaders who will get results. Let’s tell them we’re serious. Let’s exceed every expectation they’ve set for this quarter. ** Thanks, Friend. Leah Paid for by Leah for Senate
